2604.08369.title: Don't Overthink It: Inter-Rollout Action Agreement as a Free Adaptive-Compute Signal for LLM Agents
2604.08369.paper_summary: Inference-time compute scaling has emerged as a powerful technique for improving the reliability of large language model (LLM) agents, but existing methods apply compute uniformly: every decision step receives the same budget regardless of its difficulty. We introduce TrACE (Trajectorical Adaptive Compute via agrEement), a training-free controller that allocates LLM calls adaptively across agent timesteps by measuring inter-rollout action agreement. At each step, TrACE samples a small set of candidate next actions and measures how consistently the model commits to the same action. High agreement signals an easy decision; the controller commits immediately. Low agreement signals uncertainty; the controller samples additional rollouts up to a configurable cap before committing to the plurality action. No learned components, no external verifier, and no human labels are required. We evaluate TrACE against greedy decoding and fixed-budget self-consistency (SC-4, SC-8) on two benchmarks spanning single-step reasoning (GSM8K, n=50) and multi-step household navigation (MiniHouse, n=30), using a Qwen 2.5 3B Instruct model running on CPU. TrACE-4 matches SC-4 accuracy while using 33% fewer LLM calls on GSM8K and 39% fewer on MiniHouse. TrACE-8 matches SC-8 accuracy with 55% fewer calls on GSM8K and 65% fewer on MiniHouse. We further show that inter-rollout agreement is a reliable signal of step-level success, validating the core hypothesis that the model's own output consistency encodes difficulty information that can be exploited without training. TrACE is the first training-free, per-timestep adaptive-compute controller for LLM agents to be evaluated on multi-step sequential decision tasks.
2604.08369.paper_summary_zh: 推理時間計算擴展已成為提高大型語言模型（LLM）代理可靠性的強大技術，但現有方法均勻地應用計算：每個決策步驟都獲得相同的預算，無論其難度如何。我們介紹了 TrACE（通過協議的軌跡自適應計算），這是一個無需訓練的控制器，通過測量跨回合行動一致性來自適應地分配 LLM 調用到代理時間步上。在每一步，TrACE 會隨機抽取一小組候選下一步行動，並測量模型對同一行動的承諾程度。一致性高表示決策簡單；控制器立即做出承諾。一致性低則表示不確定性；控制器在承諾多數行動之前，會根據可配置的上限抽取額外的回合。無需學習組件、外部驗證者或人類標籤。我們在兩個基準上評估 TrACE，這些基準涵蓋了單步推理（GSM8K，n=50）和多步家庭導航（MiniHouse，n=30），使用在 CPU 上運行的 Qwen 2.5 3B 指令模型。TrACE-4 在 GSM8K 上的準確性與 SC-4 相匹配，同時使用的 LLM 調用減少了 33%，在 MiniHouse 上減少了 39%。TrACE-8 在 GSM8K 上的準確性與 SC-8 相匹配，調用數量減少了 55%，在 MiniHouse 上減少了 65%。我們進一步顯示，回合間的一致性是步驟級成功的可靠信號，驗證了模型自身輸出一致性編碼難度信息的核心假設，這可以在不進行訓練的情況下加以利用。TrACE 是首個在多步序列決策任務上評估的無需訓練的每步自適應計算控制器，專為 LLM 代理設計。
2604.08369.author: Khushal Sethi et.al.
